# Wernex Termite & Pest Control, Inc.

> Professional termite and pest control for residential and commercial properties in Southern Utah. Licensed, insured, and serving the St. George area for over 30 years. Same-day inspections, eco-friendly treatments, and a 100% satisfaction guarantee.

## Business Details

- **Name:** Wernex Termite & Pest Control, Inc.
- **Location:** 6097 Dry Fork Canyon Rd, Vernal, UT 84078
- **Service Area:** St. George, Washington, Hurricane, Ivins, Santa Clara, LaVerkin, Toquerville, Leeds, Springdale, Cedar City, and surrounding Southern Utah communities
- **Phone:** (435) 673-9503
- **Email:** wernexpestcontrol@gmail.com
- **Hours:** Mon–Fri 7am–7pm, Sat 8am–5pm
- **Google Rating:** 4.9 stars

## Core Services

- **Residential Pest Control:** Year-round home protection plans tailored to local pest pressure. Quarterly treatments, interior and exterior barrier sprays, and eco-friendly options available.
- **Commercial Pest Control:** Custom programs for restaurants, offices, warehouses, hotels, vacation rentals, medical facilities, and retail spaces. Compliance documentation provided. After-hours scheduling available.
- **Termite Solutions:** Advanced liquid barrier treatments (Termidor), WDI inspections for real estate transactions, pre-construction treatments, and annual monitoring.
- **Rodent Control:** Exclusion sealing, strategic trapping, snap-trap and bait-station monitoring, and ongoing prevention programs.
- **Scorpion Control:** Three-phase protocol — UV blacklight detection sweeps, targeted barrier applications, and exclusion sealing. Bark scorpion specialists for Southern Utah.
- **Bed Bug Treatment:** Thorough bed bug treatments with heat and targeted applications for residential and commercial properties.
- **Ant Control:** Colony elimination and perimeter barrier treatments for fire ants, harvester ants, pavement ants, and carpenter ants.
- **Spider Control:** Black widow, brown recluse, wolf spider, and desert spider elimination with web removal, targeted treatments, and prey-reduction barrier applications.
- **Wasp & Bee Removal:** Safe professional nest removal for paper wasps, yellow jackets, mud daubers, and carpenter bees. Same-day emergency service available.
- **Vacation Rental Pest Management:** Turnover-scheduled treatments for Airbnb and VRBO hosts in the Zion Corridor and St. George area.

## Differentiators

- 30+ years of experience in Southern Utah pest control
- Same-day emergency service available — no rush fees
- Eco-friendly and IPM-first treatment approach
- 100% satisfaction guarantee with free re-service within 30 days
- All technicians state-licensed and EPA-compliant
- BBB A+ Accredited, QualityPro Certified, NPMA Member
- Locally owned — not a national franchise
- Affordable pricing with no hidden fees and no long-term contracts required

## Service Areas (Detailed)

### Southern Utah (Primary)
- St. George, Washington, Hurricane, Ivins, Santa Clara, LaVerkin, Toquerville, Leeds, Springdale, Rockville, Virgin, Cedar City, Enterprise, Hildale

### Zion Corridor
- Springdale (~40 mi / 45 min), Rockville, Virgin, Toquerville, LaVerkin, Leeds
- Vacation rental pest management for Airbnb/VRBO hosts near Zion National Park

### Uintah Basin
- Vernal, UT (headquarters location)
